skills.author: dandye

skills.name: find-relevant-case
skills.description: Search for existing cases related to specific indicators or entities. Use to find correlation with other investigations before starting new analysis. Takes search terms and returns matching case IDs.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: pivot-on-ioc
skills.description: Explore GTI relationships for an IOC to discover related entities. Use to expand investigation by finding connected domains, IPs, files, or threat actors. Takes an IOC and relationship types to query.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: design-metadata-schema
skills.description: Design comprehensive metadata frameworks. Develops structured metadata templates and tagging systems.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: respond-phishing
skills.description: Respond to a reported phishing email following PICERL methodology. Use when a phishing email is reported or detected. Analyzes artifacts, identifies recipients who clicked, contains malicious IOCs, and removes emails from mailboxes.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: hunt-credential-access
skills.description: Hunt for credential access techniques like LSASS dumping or browser credential theft. Use when searching for evidence of credential harvesting. Takes MITRE technique IDs and searches for behavioral indicators in SIEM.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: triage-malware
skills.description: Triage a suspected malicious file hash. Use when investigating malware alerts or suspicious files. Analyzes GTI file report, behavioral indicators, identifies affected hosts, enriches network IOCs, and recommends containment actions.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: respond-compromised-account
skills.description: Respond to a potentially compromised user account. Use when impossible travel, credential stuffing, successful phishing, or suspicious activity indicates account compromise. Investigates activity, contains the account, removes persistence, and restores access.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: audit-content
skills.description: Comprehensive content quality and maintenance assessment. Evaluates documentation quality, relevance, maintenance needs, and provides actionable recommendations.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: full-investigation
skills.description: Complete Tier 2 investigation workflow. Orchestrates deep investigation of escalated cases: deep-dive-ioc, correlate-ioc, specialized triage (malware/login), pivot-on-ioc, and generate comprehensive report. Use for escalated cases requiring thorough analysis.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: generate-thesaurus
skills.description: Generate controlled vocabulary thesaurus for content domains. Creates comprehensive thesauri with preferred terms, broader/narrower/related terms.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: close-case-artifact
skills.description: Close a case or alert with proper reason and documentation. Use when triage determines an alert is FP/BTP or investigation is complete. Requires artifact ID, type, closure reason, and root cause.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: hunt-lateral-movement
skills.description: Hunt for lateral movement using PsExec, WMI, or similar techniques. Use when proactively searching for attackers moving through your network using admin tools. Searches for service installations, remote process execution, and suspicious network correlations.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: cluster-documents
skills.description: Automated content similarity and grouping analysis. Groups related documents by topic, purpose, or content similarity.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: respond-ransomware
skills.description: Respond to a ransomware incident following PICERL methodology. Use when ransomware is detected or suspected. Orchestrates identification, containment, eradication, and recovery phases. Requires CASE_ID and initial indicators.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: respond-malware
skills.description: Respond to a malware incident following PICERL methodology. Use when malware is detected on endpoints. Orchestrates triage, containment, eradication, and recovery. Works with triage-malware skill for analysis.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: document-in-case
skills.description: Add a comment to a case to document findings, actions, or recommendations. Use to maintain audit trail during investigations. Requires CASE_ID and comment text.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: hunt-apt
skills.description: Hunt for a specific APT/threat actor in your environment. Use when you have a threat actor name or GTI collection ID and want to search for their TTPs and IOCs. Gathers intelligence from GTI, searches SIEM for IOCs and TTP-based indicators, and documents findings.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: analyze-content-gaps
skills.description: Identify content gaps and organizational opportunities. Analyzes missing content areas, redundancies, and consolidation opportunities.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: check-duplicates
skills.description: Check for duplicate or similar cases. Use before deep analysis to avoid investigating the same incident twice. Takes a CASE_ID and returns list of similar cases.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: triage-alert
skills.description: Triage a security alert or case. Use when given an ALERT_ID or CASE_ID to assess if it's a real threat. Enriches IOCs, searches SIEM for context, and determines if the alert should be closed (false positive) or escalated for investigation.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: generate-taxonomy
skills.description: Develop hierarchical classification systems. Creates parent-child categorical structures for content organization.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: deep-dive-ioc
skills.description: Perform exhaustive analysis of a critical IOC. Use when an IOC needs Tier 2+ investigation beyond basic enrichment - includes GTI pivoting, deep SIEM searches, correlation with related entities, and threat attribution. For escalated IOCs requiring comprehensive investigation.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: correlate-ioc
skills.description: Check for existing SIEM alerts and case management entries related to IOCs. Use to understand if an indicator has triggered previous alerts or is part of ongoing investigations. Takes IOC list and returns related alerts and cases.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: enrich-ioc
skills.description: Enrich an IOC (IP, domain, hash, URL) with threat intelligence. Use when you need to look up reputation and context for an indicator using GTI and SIEM. Returns threat intel findings, SIEM entity summary, and IOC match status.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: full-triage-alert
skills.description: Complete Tier 1 triage workflow. Orchestrates the full alert triage process: check-duplicates, triage-alert, enrich-ioc for each entity, and either close (FP/BTP) or escalate (TP/Suspicious). Use for end-to-end alert processing.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: hunt-threat
skills.description: Conduct proactive, hypothesis-driven threat hunting. Use when performing advanced hunting based on threat intelligence, TTPs, or anomalies. For Tier 3 analysts or dedicated threat hunters. Supports iterative search, pivoting, and comprehensive documentation.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: inventory-content
skills.description: Systematic cataloging of information assets. Creates comprehensive inventories of all content with metadata and characteristics.
skills.author: dandye

skills.name: ce-onboard
skills.description: Read-only session primer for CE-first invariants, key files, and skill routing at session start.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-rtd-writer
skills.description: Write or revise RTD pages with audience-aware structure, CE-first examples, and correct toctree integration.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-adr-author
skills.description: Author or revise ADR files and release-plan ADR entries; use for new ADR drafts, status transitions, and ADR governance updates.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-rtd-auditor
skills.description: Audit RTD documentation for navigation, technical accuracy, audience fit, and ADR or standards consistency.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-code-review
skills.description: Review code changes for CE coding standards, ADR conformance, and behavior or API regression risk.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-plot-review
skills.description: Review visualization code for ADR-compliant PlotSpec behavior, lazy imports, and renderer correctness.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-deprecation
skills.description: Implement ADR-011 deprecation and removal workflows with correct warnings, migration notes, and release timeline handling.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-skill-audit
skills.description: Audit the skills catalog for frontmatter quality, trigger precision, structural hygiene, and registry synchronization.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-adr-consult
skills.description: Map a proposed change to governing ADRs and constraints before implementation; use for ADR applicability and conflict checks.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-release-task
skills.description: Identify the next release task from RELEASE_PLAN_v1.md and vX.Y.Z_plan.md, plan implementation, execute it, and verify closure with tests and gates.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-plugin-audit
skills.description: Audit plugin implementations for registry trust rules, metadata validity, and ADR contract compliance.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-reject-policy
skills.description: Configure reject and defer decision policies and interpret RejectResult behavior in prediction and explanation flows.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-skill-creator
skills.description: Create or refactor skills with precise triggers, reusable assets and references, and synchronized registry updates.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-fallback-impl
skills.description: Implement fallback chains that always emit UserWarning and INFO logs per CE fallback-visibility policy.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-data-preparation
skills.description: Validate and preprocess input data for CE pipelines, handle mixed types and categorical features, and configure encoding per ADR-002 and ADR-009.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-pipeline-builder
skills.description: Build CE-first end-to-end pipelines using WrapCalibratedExplainer with fit, calibrate, and explain or predict sequencing.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-calibrated-predict
skills.description: Produce calibrated predict and predict_proba outputs, with optional uncertainty intervals, without generating explanations.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-performance-tuning
skills.description: Configure CE caching, parallel execution, batch-size tuning, and FAST feature filtering per ADR-003 and ADR-004 for faster explanations on large datasets.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-payload-governance
skills.description: Validate explanation payload schemas, metadata and provenance fields, and ADR-005 and ADR-028 governance invariants.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-modality-extension
skills.description: Extend CE to non-tabular data modalities (vision, audio, timeseries, text) via ADR-033 plugin contracts, modality naming rules, and extension safety guardrails.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-integration-compare
skills.description: Guide CE integration with SHAP and LIME, compare explanation outputs, and configure the calibrated-explanations integration adapters.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-skill-registry-sync
skills.description: Synchronize all skill registries with filesystem inventory after any skill add, remove, rename, or move.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-serialization-audit
skills.description: Audit save and load behavior for ADR-031 schema contracts, invariants, and round-trip safety.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-regression-intervals
skills.description: Configure and interpret CE regression intervals for percentile conformal and thresholded probabilistic modes.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-alternatives-explore
skills.description: Generate and interpret CE alternative and counterfactual explanations, including ensured filters and alternatives-specific plot workflows.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-code-quality-auditor
skills.description: Audit source and tests for ADR-030 anti-patterns, determinism failures, API-boundary violations, and test-helper leakage with Option A/B/C handling from the Test Quality Method.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-mondrian-conditional
skills.description: Configure and validate Mondrian and conditional calibration for subgroup-aware uncertainty and fairness-sensitive workflows.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-logging-observability
skills.description: Apply ADR-028 and STD-005 logging and observability rules, including governance versus operational separation.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-regulatory-compliance
skills.description: Map calibrated_explanations capabilities to EU AI Act, GDPR, AI Liability Directive, and Product Liability Directive obligations for compliance documentation and presentation materials.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-standards-gap-analyzer
skills.description: Analyze standards compliance by interpreting the standards's intent, verifying that implementation and RTD satisfy every decision, and producing a dated gap report with only unresolved items.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-release-check
skills.description: Read release-plan state and select the next ADR-compliant actionable development step.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-notebook-audit
skills.description: Audit notebooks for public-API correctness, policy compliance, and private-member usage violations.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-classification
skills.description: Handle CE classification workflows for binary and multiclass prediction semantics and class-focused explanation behavior.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-devils-advocate
skills.description: Adversarially challenge cleanup and test proposals for hidden risk, weak evidence, and coverage or behavior regressions, including Option A/B/C focus-specific risks.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-deadcode-hunter
skills.description: Identify unreachable or non-contributing source code and separate true dead code from merely untested reachable paths, with Test Quality Method Option A/B/C routing.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-plotspec-author
skills.description: Author or extend PlotSpec-based visualizations with validated IR contracts and backend-agnostic rendering.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-factual-explain
skills.description: Generate factual CE explanations and select the correct guarded versus standard factual workflow.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-release-planner
skills.description: Analyze RELEASE_PLAN_v1.md for an upcoming release version and produce a detailed vX.Y.Z_plan.md implementation plan with task breakdowns.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-plugin-scaffold
skills.description: Scaffold interval, explanation, or plot plugins that satisfy registry metadata and trust-model contracts. For non-tabular modalities (vision, audio, timeseries), use ce-modality-extension instead.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-serializer-impl
skills.description: Implement ADR-031 serializer and persistence APIs with versioned primitives and compatible load behavior.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-explain-interact
skills.description: Post-process CE explanations by narrating, plotting, inspecting rules, filtering features, and managing conjunctions.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-adr-gap-analyzer
skills.description: Analyze ADR compliance by interpreting the ADR's intent, verifying that implementation and RTD satisfy every decision, and producing a dated gap report with only unresolved items.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-release-finalize
skills.description: Execute the PyPI release checklist for calibrated-explanations: version bumps, changelog, build, validation, tagging, RTD publication, and PyPI upload.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-docstring-author
skills.description: Write or repair NumPy-style docstrings for public CE APIs following STD-002 and contributor documentation rules.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-test-audit
skills.description: Audit existing tests for ADR-030 anti-patterns, redundancy risk, and compliance with repository test standards.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-test-author
skills.description: Write individual CE test cases for specified modules or behaviors using AAA structure, public-API focus, and coverage-gate discipline. Does NOT identify coverage gaps; use ce-test-creator for gap-driven test design.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-test-creator
skills.description: Design tests to close documented coverage gaps identified by gap analysis, without padding. Adapts recommendations for Option A/B/C in the Test Quality Method. Use ce-test-author to write tests for already-known targets.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-fallback-test
skills.description: Author tests that verify fallback visibility through opt-in fixtures, warning assertions, and INFO log side effects.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-test-quality-method
skills.description: Orchestrate end-to-end ADR-030 test-quality remediation by routing work across specialist skills (ce-test-pruning-expert, ce-test-creator, ce-test-audit, ce-code-quality-auditor, ce-deadcode-hunter, ce-devils-advocate) using the Test Quality Method with Option A/B/C focus selection.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: ce-test-pruning-expert
skills.description: Identify redundant or low-value tests using unique-lines and overlap evidence while preserving behavior coverage, with Option A/B/C routing from the Test Quality Method.
skills.author: Moffran

skills.name: lfi
skills.description: Guide Local File Inclusion (LFI) and Remote File Inclusion (RFI) exploitation during authorized penetration testing.
skills.author: blacklanternsecurity

skills.name: xxe
skills.description: Guide XML External Entity (XXE) injection exploitation during authorized penetration testing.
skills.author: blacklanternsecurity

skills.name: idor
skills.description: Exploit Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) and broken access control vulnerabilities during authorized penetration testing.
skills.author: blacklanternsecurity

skills.name: gpo-abuse
skills.description: Exploits Group Policy Objects for code execution, privilege escalation, and lateral movement in Active Directory. Covers GPO enumeration (GPOHound, BloodHound, PowerView), exploitation via immediate tasks, logon scripts, and registry modifications (SharpGPOAbuse, PowerGPOAbuse, pyGPOAbuse, GroupPolicyBackdoor), SYSVOL/NETLOGON logon script poisoning, and GPP password extraction.
